name: studybuddy
description: Study Buddy — all-in-one digital study companion (scalable MVP)

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=@studybuddy/api & npm run dev --workspace=@studybuddy/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@studybuddy/shared && npm run build --workspace=@studybuddy/api && npm run build --workspace=@studybuddy/web
